integrity.description: Check that the agent used the Odoo web interface to make inventory adjustments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo ERP web interface (e.g., Inventory module, Inventory Adjustments list, or Lot/Serial numbers views) being actively used.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to directly modify the database or result files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing python scripts, psql commands, or direct edits to /tmp/manual_production_result.json to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show genuine Odoo Inventory module screens.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Odoo elements like the top navigation bar, breadcrumbs, and list/form views for inventory adjustments.
